reasons: Rafaela helps Bruno survive lane pressure and reposition during trades, while Bruno supplies the main damage.
Bruno can use Rafaela's speed support to keep safer attack spacing after short trades.

proof.summary: Rafaela supports Bruno's gold-lane trading pattern with heal and speed, helping him kite or chase after a successful hit.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela stays near Bruno during early lane contests.
Bruno uses the speed window to keep safe attack spacing.
failureCases: Bruno is caught by hard engage before Rafaela can heal.
Rafaela roams too far while Bruno is under pressure.

reasons: Rafaela helps Layla compensate for weak self-peel by giving heal and movement support.
Layla can keep firing from range more safely when Rafaela helps her reposition.

proof.summary: Rafaela improves Layla's survival and spacing, letting Layla keep firing from range instead of being forced out immediately.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela saves speed support for enemy dive or chase timing.
failureCases: Enemy assassins reach Layla before Rafaela can respond.
Layla overextends because of the speed boost.

reasons: Rafaela's speed and heal help Zilong chase, disengage, and continue pressure after a pickoff attempt.
Zilong benefits from Rafaela's support when he needs to enter or leave a side-lane skirmish quickly.

proof.summary: Rafaela enables Zilong's chase pattern by helping him close distance or escape after forcing a target out of position.
worksBestWhen: Zilong commits after Rafaela has support skills available.
Rafaela follows the pickoff without entering the enemy backline too deeply.
failureCases: Zilong dives too far for Rafaela to support.
Enemy control stops Zilong before the chase matters.

reasons: Rafaela helps Balmond stay active in extended skirmishes while he creates frontline pressure.
Balmond can use Rafaela's speed and heal to continue chasing or reset after absorbing damage.

proof.summary: Rafaela's sustain and speed help Balmond stay close to enemies and keep pressuring during longer fights.
worksBestWhen: Balmond uses Rafaela's speed to either chase or reset.
Rafaela does not stand inside Balmond's frontline path.
failureCases: Enemy anti-heal reduces the sustain value.
Balmond is kited beyond Rafaela's support range.

reasons: Rafaela helps Alucard chase and survive longer in brawls, giving him more time to use lifesteal and damage.
Alucard benefits from movement support when he needs to stay attached to a target.

proof.summary: Rafaela supports Alucard's dive-brawl pattern by helping him stay close and recover during extended melee fights.
worksBestWhen: Alucard enters after Rafaela is near enough to support.
Rafaela uses speed support to help Alucard stick to targets or disengage.
failureCases: Enemy burst or anti-heal removes the sustain advantage.
